title: Conis Warns the Crew
description: Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.
scene: Across pages 0, 3, 4, 5, this scene centers on Sky Island soldier, Conis, McKinley, Luffy, Nami. Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: OH! But first, let me finish eating...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I can't even see the top.

summary: Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.
